task_completion.description: Establish the 'NestWell Europe' Store Group under the Main Website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin panel (Stores > All Stores), the grid should display a Store named 'NestWell Europe' associated with the 'Main Website' in the Web Site column.

task_completion.description: Create the 'French Store View' under the 'NestWell Europe' Store Group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Stores > All Stores grid, 'French Store View' should be listed in the Store View column, grouped under the 'NestWell Europe' Store.

task_completion.description: Set the French Store View code to 'nestwell_fr' and locale to 'French (France)'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Store View configuration page with the code 'nestwell_fr', and the Configuration > General > Locale Options page (scoped to French Store View) with 'French (France)' selected.

task_completion.description: Create the 'German Store View' under the 'NestWell Europe' Store Group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Stores > All Stores grid, 'German Store View' should be listed in the Store View column, grouped under the 'NestWell Europe' Store.

task_completion.description: Set the German Store View code to 'nestwell_de' and locale to 'German (Germany)'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Store View configuration page with the code 'nestwell_de', and the Configuration > General > Locale Options page (scoped to German Store View) with 'German (Germany)' selected.

task_completion.description: Enable 'Euro' as an allowed currency for the Main Website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Stores > Configuration > General > Currency Setup, with the store view scope set to 'Main Website', 'Euro' should be selected/highlighted in the 'Allowed Currencies' multi-select list.

integrity.description: The agent used the Magento Admin GUI to configure the store settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show navigation through the Magento Admin panel (e.g., Stores, Configuration menus) rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a real web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser interface, URL bar, and Magento page elements should be visible and properly rendered, not simulated in a text editor or mocked HTML.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no open browser developer tools (Inspect Element) modifying the DOM to display the expected store names or currency settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Store Group Name: 'NestWell Europe'. French Store View: Name 'French Store View', Code 'nestwell_fr', Locale 'fr_FR' (French (France)). German Store View: Name 'German Store View', Code 'nestwell_de', Locale 'de_DE' (German (Germany)). Currency: 'EUR' (Euro).
